identity.variant: K2 / Bumblebee; Basic, Bipedal Development and Wheeled Development versions
identity.notes: Kepler公式K2製品ページ、Kepler OS開発者ページ、公式企業発表（PR Newswire配信）とKepler公式LinkedIn導入投稿を確認。構成別の移動方式・重量・DoF・算力を混在させていない。

positioningFacts.statement: General-purpose humanoid robot positioned for factory-sector work, heavy loads, long endurance and dual-arm collaborative handling
Official K2 configuration sheet separates Basic, Bipedal Development and Wheeled Development versions; industrial versions can be customized
Kepler positions K2 Bumblebee as a commercially available hybrid-architecture humanoid and announced customer shipping/mass production

mobility.rawValue: Bipedal Development Version / Wheeled Development Version / Basic Version
mobility.condition: the published K2 family includes both bipedal and wheeled development versions; generic robot record cannot select one
mobility.evidenceSummary: 現行公式構成表が二足・車輪・Basicを別構成として掲載。

heightCm.condition: official K2 product value; page displays the height alongside both 75kg and 135kg configurations
heightCm.evidenceSummary: K2公式ページの身長175cmを確認。

weightKg.rawValue: 75kg and 135kg configuration values are both displayed
weightKg.condition: weight differs by configuration; generic K2 value not selected
weightKg.evidenceSummary: 二足系75kgと車輪系135kgと読める2構成値が公式ページにあり、単一値へ統合していない。

speedMps.rawValue: No numeric maximum or normal locomotion speed found on reviewed K2 product, developer or official news pages
speedMps.condition: walking/navigation capability is not converted to speed
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 速度の公式数値は確認できない。

dof.rawValue: Basic Version: 30 DoF; Bipedal Development/Wheeled Development: 52 full-body DoF; single leg 6, single arm 7, single dexterous hand 11
dof.variant: K2 Basic / Bipedal Development / Wheeled Development
dof.condition: configuration-dependent total; no single generic K2 value selected
dof.evidenceSummary: 公式K2構成表の30/52 DoFとscope別内訳を確認。

payloadKg.rawValue: Official page states dual-arm collaborative handling 25–30kg; range is retained as loadRatings and not copied into scalar payloadKg
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 両腕の公式荷重表現はloadRatingsへ分離。

runtimeMin.condition: official endurance statement; exact task mix not stated
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: 公式ページの8時間稼働を確認。

batteryCapacityWh.rawValue: Battery capacity in Wh/Ah not published on reviewed K2 pages
batteryCapacityWh.condition: do not derive capacity from 8-hour endurance

chargeTimeMin.condition: official fast-charge statement; full-charge interpretation follows wording
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 公式ページの1時間充電を確認。

batterySystem.rawValue: 1-hour charge / 8-hour endurance; battery chemistry, voltage, capacity and swap method not stated
batterySystem.condition: only charging/endurance system wording is normalized
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 充電可能な電源方式と充電時間は確認できるが、電池仕様詳細は非公開。

controlMethod.rawValue: Self-developed Nebula System: visual SLAM, multimodal interaction, hand-eye coordination, motion planning and control; autonomous route planning and task execution
controlMethod.normalizedValue: autonomous navigation / multimodal interaction / motion planning and control
controlMethod.condition: official product positioning; specific teleoperation controller not stated
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: Nebula・Visual SLAM・自律経路計画・動作計画を確認。

sdk.rawValue: Secondary Development Platform for Bipedal/Wheeled Development; Kepler OS open platform with interfaces, documentation, sample projects, visual programming, online debugging, multi-robot collaboration and OTA roadmap
sdk.condition: official developer platform, not a versioned SDK package
sdk.evidenceSummary: 公式開発者ページが公開インターフェース、資料、サンプル、遠隔デバッグ等を記載。

computePlatform.rawValue: Basic Version: no GPU computing power listed; Bipedal/Wheeled Development: 100 TOPS GPU computing power with upgrade support
computePlatform.variant: K2 Basic / Bipedal Development / Wheeled Development
computePlatform.condition: compute differs by package; board/model name not published
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 構成別の100 TOPS有無は確認できるが、単一搭載基盤名はない。

ipRating.rawValue: No IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed K2 product, developer or news pages
ipRating.condition: industrial positioning is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No operating-temperature range found on reviewed K2 product, developer, contact or news pages
operatingTemperature.condition: no temperature value inferred from factory deployment
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: No named K2 safety standard or certification number found on reviewed official pages
safetyStandard.condition: industrial/collaborative wording is not a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全規格・認証番号は確認できない。

loadRatings.condition: lower endpoint of official dual-arm collaborative handling range 25–30kg; rated/maximum wording not stated
upper endpoint of official dual-arm collaborative handling range 25–30kg; rated/maximum wording not stated

officialUseCases.officialExpression: precision integration in intelligent manufacturing / industrial scenarios
officialUseCases.reason: 公式ページが製造のprecision integrationとindustrial scenariosを明示しているため。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: product verification and quality alerting / inspection scenarios
officialUseCases.reason: 公式ページがproduct verification、quality alerting、inspection scenariosを明示しているため。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: scientific research services / data acquisition / research and education
officialUseCases.reason: K2の構成表と製品ページが研究サービス・データ取得・研究教育を明示しているため。

usageExamples.title: Kepler robot debuts at SAIC-GM for industrial tests
usageExamples.summary: Kepler公式LinkedIn投稿が、K2系ヒューマノイドをSAIC-GMで実環境の産業試験に投入したと説明する。

usageExamples.title: Kepler K2 'Bumblebee' Enters Production at Zhaofeng Motor
usageExamples.summary: Kepler公式LinkedIn投稿が、Zhaofeng Motorの実生産ラインで自律移動と部品のloading/unloadingを行うK2 Bumblebeeを説明する。

usageExamples.title: Kepler K2 Humanoid Begins Work at Veichi Electric
usageExamples.summary: Kepler公式LinkedIn投稿が、VEICHI Electricの製造施設でK2 Bumblebeeの実環境トライアル開始を報告する。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Kepler announced K2 Bumblebee mass production and customer shipping in September 2025; official product page directs purchase consultation and publishes no price
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式企業発表で量産・顧客出荷を確認。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipping or local availability statement found on reviewed Kepler official pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手可否は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed Kepler official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official sales/contact channels and Kepler OS developer documentation are public; Japan support, repair SLA and field-service terms are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 問い合わせ窓口は確認できるが、購入後サポート条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: Official purchase consultation page reviewed; no public K2 amount found.

conflicts: K2 configuration sheet contains Basic, Bipedal Development and Wheeled Development variants; mobility, weight, DoF and GPU availability cannot be collapsed to one generic configuration.
The current K2 product page displays 75kg and 135kg values alongside the same 175cm/52 DoF family; variant assignment is retained for review rather than inferred as a single weight.
humanReviewRequired: Select K2 Basic, Bipedal Development or Wheeled Development before publishing a single mobility, weight, DoF, compute or load value.
Confirm the Japanese procurement channel and current price/support terms if K2 is to be offered domestically.

identity.notes: Kepler公式K1製品ルート、Kepler OS開発者ページ、About、調達問い合わせページを確認。K2の52 DoF・8時間・25–30kgをK1へ流用していない。

positioningFacts.statement: Forerunner general-purpose humanoid robot, independently developed and positioned as an assistant for industrial production and a partner for humanity
Official K1 page lists Education & Research, Smart Inspection, Automated Production Line, Warehousing & Logistics, High-risk Environment and Outdoor Tasks
Kepler OS is presented as an open humanoid-robot operating system with interfaces, documentation, sample projects and online development/debugging

mobility.rawValue: humanoid robot with walking on complex terrain and visual navigation; K1 page does not explicitly label a bipedal/wheeled configuration
mobility.condition: movement type is not assigned from humanoid wording alone
mobility.evidenceSummary: 歩行・複雑地形対応は確認できるが、公式K1ページに二足/車輪の明示がない。

speedMps.rawValue: No numeric maximum or normal locomotion speed found on reviewed K1 product and developer pages
speedMps.condition: complex-terrain walking is not converted to speed
speedMps.evidenceSummary: 速度の公式数値は確認できない。

dof.condition: official K1 product route; hand 12 DoF is a sub-scope and not added to whole-body total
dof.evidenceSummary: 全身40 DoFと手12 DoFのscopeを分離して確認。

payloadKg.rawValue: K1 page says powerful load carrying but publishes no numeric payload/load rating
payloadKg.condition: load-carrying wording is not converted to a payload number
payloadKg.evidenceSummary: 荷重の数値は確認できない。

runtimeMin.rawValue: K1 runtime/endurance duration not published on reviewed official K1 pages
runtimeMin.evidenceSummary: K1の稼働時間は確認できない。

batteryCapacityWh.condition: do not import K2 battery/charge statements

chargeTimeMin.condition: do not import K2 one-hour charge
chargeTimeMin.evidenceSummary: 充電時間は確認できない。

batterySystem.rawValue: K1 battery system, voltage, chemistry and swap method not published
batterySystem.condition: do not infer a battery system from humanoid product status
batterySystem.evidenceSummary: 電池方式は確認できない。

controlMethod.rawValue: Visual SLAM, visual recognition, multimodal interaction, hand-eye coordination, autonomous route planning, motion planning and control
controlMethod.normalizedValue: autonomous navigation / multimodal interaction / motion planning and control
controlMethod.condition: official product and developer-platform descriptions; specific hand controller not stated
controlMethod.evidenceSummary: K1公式ページのVisual SLAM・自律経路計画・マルチモーダル操作を確認。

sdk.rawValue: Kepler OS open platform: interface development, detailed reference documents, sample projects, visual programming, online development/debugging, remote status/control and multi-robot collaboration
sdk.condition: official developer platform, not a versioned SDK package
sdk.evidenceSummary: 公式開発者プラットフォームの公開インターフェース・資料・サンプルを確認。

computePlatform.rawValue: 100 TOPS computing power / 100 TOPS high-computing motherboard
computePlatform.normalizedValue: 100 TOPS compute platform; board model not published
computePlatform.evidenceSummary: 公式K1ページの100 TOPS。搭載ボード名は非公開。

ipRating.rawValue: No IP ingress-protection rating found on reviewed K1 pages
ipRating.condition: outdoor/high-risk positioning is not an IP rating
ipRating.evidenceSummary: 防塵防水等級は確認できない。

operatingTemperature.rawValue: No operating-temperature range found on reviewed K1 product, developer or contact pages
operatingTemperature.condition: outdoor-task positioning is not a temperature range
operatingTemperature.evidenceSummary: 動作温度は確認できない。

safetyStandard.rawValue: No named K1 safety standard or certification number found on reviewed official pages
safetyStandard.condition: high-risk-operation positioning is not a standard
safetyStandard.evidenceSummary: 安全規格・認証番号は確認できない。

officialUseCases.reason: 公式K1ページが教育・研究を明示しているため。

officialUseCases.officialExpression: Smart Inspection / visual recognition / early crisis detection
officialUseCases.reason: 公式K1ページがスマート検査と周辺環境の検知を明示しているため。
公式K1ページが自動生産ラインと精密組立を明示しているため。

marketAvailability.rawValue: Official K1 page says the Forerunner series will be commercialized and mass-produced in the near future and provides purchase consultation; current K1 shipment status is not stated
marketAvailability.evidenceSummary: 公式の将来量産・購入相談表記は確認したが、K1の現行出荷状況は確認できない。

japanAvailability.rawValue: No Japan sales, shipping or local availability statement found on reviewed Kepler official pages
japanAvailability.evidenceSummary: 日本での入手可否は確認できない。

distributorJapan.rawValue: No domestic authorized distributor identified on reviewed Kepler official pages
distributorJapan.evidenceSummary: 国内正規代理店は確認できない。

supportNote.rawValue: Official sales/contact channels and Kepler OS developer documentation are public; K1-specific support, Japan support and repair SLA are not published
supportNote.evidenceSummary: 問い合わせ窓口は確認できるが、購入後サポート条件は非公開。

sourceCandidates.reason: Official purchase consultation page reviewed; no public K1 amount found.
Official K1 page lists application categories but no named deployment case; usageExamples remains empty.

conflicts: The K1 official route presents the Forerunner family as a general platform and gives 178cm/85kg/40 DoF/100 TOPS, but it does not publish battery/runtime/payload/speed details; K2 values were not copied into K1.
humanReviewRequired: Confirm whether the published K1 route's family-level values apply to the exact Forerunner K1 production configuration.
Confirm current K1 procurement status, price, Japan availability and support from Kepler before publishing it as purchasable.
